subject: [ALERT] homelab-k8s is DOWN
body: Glanceboard detected that homelab-k8s stopped responding to health checks at 21:14 PT. The ridgeline-api pod has been unreachable for 2 minutes. We will notify you when it recovers.

subject: [RESOLVED] homelab-k8s is back UP
body: Good news — homelab-k8s recovered at 21:39 PT after 25 minutes of downtime. All health checks are green again. The ridgeline-api pod restarted cleanly.

subject: Ridgeline 2025 in review — 312 bookmarks saved
body: Happy New Year, Jason! In 2025 you saved 312 bookmarks across Ridgeline, read 268 of them, and your top tag was 'golang'. Here is your year-in-review. Thanks for self-hosting Ridgeline.

subject: [ALERT] SSL certificate expiring in 7 days
body: Glanceboard noticed the TLS certificate for ridgelinesystems.com expires in 7 days (2026-01-26). Renew it via Cloudflare or your cert-manager to avoid downtime. This is an automated heads-up.

subject: [ALERT] homelab-k8s disk usage at 91%
body: Glanceboard warning: the homelab-k8s primary volume is at 91% capacity. Postgres WAL and Ridgeline image cache are the largest consumers. Free space or expand the volume to avoid write failures.
